chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.238 of 2020 Pakistan Railway Versus Additional Registrar (OS) High Court of Sindh and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.2859/2020 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 17.05.2024 None present for appellant. Mr. Yousuf Moulvi, Advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Appellant’s counsel is not attending the matter since last three dates. He was called absent on 08.11.2022, 21.12.2023, 23.04.2024 and so also today; there is no intimation either. The appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
